holdings.infoBox: BOEU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily BA Bull 2X ETF (BOEU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Boeing Company index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Boeing Company stock. BOEU was launched on Apr 23, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
